info.name: Diploma Zero Trust API v1
info.description: Generated from backend FastAPI routes (prefix /api/v1). Set collection variables after login/register.

request.description: Public probe.
Always 200 regardless of whether the email exists (enumeration protection).
Identical 200 response for unknown email — prevents email enumeration.
Obtain raw token from backend stdout after calling /reset/request.
Returns step_up_token. Save it as {{step_up_token}} for use in X-Step-Up-Token header.
User has no MFA secret — step-up is only available after MFA enable.
ADMIN role — returns all users with security metadata. Sensitive fields excluded.
AUDITOR role is not allowed to enumerate users (SR-11).
ADMIN role — returns audit log entries newest-first.
AUDITOR role is allowed to read audit logs (SR-11).
ADMIN role — returns security event records newest-first.
AUDITOR role is allowed to read security events (SR-11).

item.name: Accounts me — first access creates account (200)

request.description: Verified user with no account yet. Account is created on first call (lazy provisioning).
Second call returns the same account without creating a new one.
Email not verified. SR-03 gate rejects access.
Amount below $1000 threshold. No X-Step-Up-Token header needed.
High-value transfer. First call POST /auth/step-up to obtain {{step_up_token}}.
Step-up gate fires before balance check. Missing token always returns 403.
Default pagination (page=1, page_size=50). Returns only own transactions.
page_size max is 100.
